message:
fix(ft-core): fail closed on integer/bool storage span overflow (frankentorch-j33)

Extracted contiguous_required_len() as a free function and replaced all
bare arithmetic (storage_offset + numel) in DenseI64Tensor, DenseI32Tensor,
and DenseBoolTensor with checked_add so an overflowing span surfaces as
StorageSpanOverflow rather than a silent wrap or panic. Added six regression
tests covering both from_storage and contiguous_values paths for each type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
